tests.name: Branches obrigatórias (8 branches existem)
tests.run: ESPERADAS=(fix/imagens-cores fix/rodape fix/sobre-nos-texto feature/secao-equipe fix/menu-projetos feature/secao-contato feature/redes-sociais docs/readme); FALTANDO=0; for b in "${ESPERADAS[@]}"; do if ! git branch -r | grep -q "origin/$b"; then echo "❌ Faltando: $b"; FALTANDO=$((FALTANDO+1)); else echo "✅ $b"; fi; done; [ $FALTANDO -eq 0 ]

tests.name: Padrão de nomes das branches (feature/fix/hotfix/docs)
tests.run: INVALIDAS=0; for b in $(git branch -r | grep -v HEAD | grep -v main | sed 's/ *origin\///'); do if ! echo "$b" | grep -qE '^(feature|fix|hotfix|docs|style|refactor)/'; then echo "❌ Fora do padrão: $b"; INVALIDAS=$((INVALIDAS+1)); else echo "✅ $b"; fi; done; [ $INVALIDAS -eq 0 ]

tests.name: Conventional Commits (≥80% dos commits)
tests.run: TOTAL=0; CORRETOS=0; while IFS= read -r line; do MSG=$(echo "$line" | cut -d' ' -f2-); if echo "$MSG" | grep -qiE '^Merge'; then continue; fi; TOTAL=$((TOTAL+1)); if echo "$MSG" | grep -qE '^(feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|test|chore|perf|ci|build|revert)(\(.+\))?: .+'; then CORRETOS=$((CORRETOS+1)); else echo "❌ $line"; fi; done <<< "$(git log --oneline --no-merges --all)"; echo "$CORRETOS/$TOTAL commits no padrão"; [ $TOTAL -gt 0 ] && [ $((CORRETOS*100/TOTAL)) -ge 80 ]

tests.name: Mínimo de 2 commits por branch
tests.run: INSUF=0; for b in $(git branch -r | grep -v HEAD | grep -v main | sed 's/ *origin\///'); do COUNT=$(git log --oneline origin/main..origin/$b --no-merges 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "$COUNT" -lt 2 ] && [ "$COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then echo "❌ $b: $COUNT commit(s)"; INSUF=$((INSUF+1)); else echo "✅ $b: $COUNT commits"; fi; done; [ $INSUF -eq 0 ]

tests.name: Pull Requests (≥8 mergeados com descrição)
tests.run: TOTAL_PRS=$(gh pr list --state all --json number,title,body,state --limit 50 | jq length); MERGED=$(gh pr list --state all --json state --limit 50 | jq '[.[] | select(.state=="MERGED")] | length'); SEM_DESC=$(gh pr list --state all --json body --limit 50 | jq '[.[] | select(.body==null or .body=="")] | length'); echo "PRs totais: $TOTAL_PRS"; echo "PRs mergeados: $MERGED"; echo "PRs sem descrição: $SEM_DESC"; [ "$MERGED" -ge 8 ] && [ "$SEM_DESC" -eq 0 ]

tests.name: Issues (≥5 com assignees)
tests.run: TOTAL=$(gh issue list --state all --json number --limit 50 | jq length); SEM_ASSIGN=$(gh issue list --state all --json assignees --limit 50 | jq '[.[] | select(.assignees | length == 0)] | length'); echo "Issues totais: $TOTAL"; echo "Sem assignee: $SEM_ASSIGN"; [ "$TOTAL" -ge 5 ] && [ "$SEM_ASSIGN" -eq 0 ]

tests.name: GitHub Pages + README completo
tests.run: CHECKS=0; if [ -f index.html ]; then echo '✅ index.html existe'; CHECKS=$((CHECKS+1)); else echo '❌ index.html não encontrado'; fi; if [ -f README.md ]; then echo '✅ README.md existe'; if grep -qi 'socialconnect\|social connect\|rede social' README.md; then echo '  ✅ Resumo do projeto'; CHECKS=$((CHECKS+1)); fi; if grep -qi 'html\|css\|javascript\|tecnolog' README.md; then echo '  ✅ Tecnologias'; CHECKS=$((CHECKS+1)); fi; if grep -qi 'integrante\|membro\|equipe\|grupo\|RM\|rm' README.md; then echo '  ✅ Integrantes'; CHECKS=$((CHECKS+1)); fi; if grep -qi 'github.io\|pages' README.md; then echo '  ✅ Link do Pages'; CHECKS=$((CHECKS+1)); fi; else echo '❌ README.md não encontrado'; fi; echo "Checks: $CHECKS/5"; [ $CHECKS -ge 4 ]
